passages.title: Reading Passage C
passages.content: <!-- Example passage body. The uploader only requires non-empty content for the schema and the editor; the actual prose is not used by these example fixtures. Replace with real IELTS passage text when running the uploader end-to-end. -->

questions.content: 1 Which TWO of the following are mentioned in the passage as reasons the Metropolitan line was built?

options.label: B
options.text: A royal request to connect two palaces

options.label: C
options.text: Pressure from commuters travelling long distances

options.label: D
options.text: A desire to showcase new tunnelling technology

options.label: E
options.text: A surplus in the city's transport budget

questions.content: 2 Which THREE of the following challenges did the early engineers face?

options.label: D
options.text: Frequent fires in the tunnel sections

options.label: E
options.text: Opposition from property owners above the planned route

options.label: F
options.text: Limited working space inside the shield
